# Document360 Pricing Plans and Features (2026)

## Summary

Document360 removed public pricing in late 2024 and moved to quote-based pricing across all tiers. The free plan was discontinued in November 2024. Historical pricing ranged from ~$199/month (Professional) to ~$499/month (Enterprise) per project, but verified customers report nearly doubled costs in 2026. SSO is Enterprise-only, which is a critical constraint for teams evaluating the platform on lower tiers. Three tiers exist: Professional, Business, and Enterprise. AI Search and ticket deflection are available on Business tier and above only.

## Key Quotations / Statistics

- "Document360 removed public pricing in late 2024 and now uses quote-based pricing"
- "The platform discontinued its free plan in November 2024"
- "Historical pricing: Professional ~$199/month, Business ~$249-$299/month, Enterprise ~$499/month per project"
- "Verified customers reporting nearly doubled costs for equivalent features" in 2026
- SSO (SAML, JWT, OpenID) is Enterprise-only
- "AI search suite, ticket deflector" available on Business tier and above
- "50+ language translation support" available across all plans
- Custom domain available on all plans
- "Sandbox environment, AI premium suite" available on Enterprise only

## Plan Details

**Professional** (small to mid-sized teams):
- 24/5 support
- KB management, templates, bulk actions
- AI Writer Suite (but NO AI search)
- Basic analytics and SEO tools

**Business** (growing teams):
- 30+ integrations (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Slack, Microsoft Teams)
- Public API access
- Approval and publishing workflows
- AI search suite AND ticket deflector
- Backup & restore, dedicated CSM

**Enterprise** (large organizations):
- SSO (SAML, JWT, OpenID), IP restriction, audit logging
- Custom email domain, search within attachments
- Sandbox environment, AI premium suite
- Salesforce integration

## Add-ons Available
- Additional projects, workspaces, languages, translation credits, storage, users, and readers

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- This source directly answers the Command Brief's open question: "Does Document360 support custom domain + SSO on their Growth plan?" - Answer: SSO is Enterprise-only; custom domain is available on all plans
- Critical for `guides/01-platform-selection.md`: Document360's quote-based pricing makes pre-sales comparison harder; teams should budget for "doubled from 2024 prices"
- The "AI search is Business tier and above" rule aligns with the Bee's directive: "do not recommend enterprise-tier KB platform to pre-growth-stage team" - Document360 AI features require Business/Enterprise pricing
- The 50+ language translation support across all plans makes Document360 the strongest multi-language option among all platforms reviewed
- The discontinued free plan means there is no low-risk trial path; teams must commit to a paid project
